title: Opening for Category Manager at Livspace Capital India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Livspace Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Livspace Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Livspace Capital India:
Livspace Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Livspace Capital India!
